mapper.insert: SELECT SEQ_PLG_PB.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL INSERT INTO PROOF_BOARD ( PROOF_NO, USER_ID, JOIN_NO, TITLE, CATEGORY, QUANTITY, CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, DELETED, UPDATED ) VALUES ( #{proofNo}, #{userId}, #{joinNo}, #{title}, #{category}, #{quantity}, #{content}, SYSDATE, 'N', 'N' )
mapper.sql: SELECT PROOF_NO , USER_ID , JOIN_NO , TITLE , CATEGORY , QUANTITY , CONTENT , CREATE_DATE FROM PROOF_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
